title: KeepMyModMenuScroll(KMMMS)
description: This mod keeps your mod menu page scroll after you leave the mod menu screen
body:
# KeepMyModMenuScroll

When the client loads a large number of mods, if you need to repeatedly configure a certain mod through ModMenu (for example, when testing and adjusting mod parameters), you have to scroll to that mod and click the configuration button each time.
This mod makes Mod Menu’s mod list remember the scroll position from before exiting the mod list screen, providing convenience when adjusting mod configurations.
